root_cause_analysis.summary: loadJitsiScript() hangs on re-mount due to stale <script> element from pre-mount execution
sequence: 1. Cloudscape Modal renders JitsiEmbed children even when visible=false
2. JitsiEmbed useEffect fires on hidden mount: fetchJitsiToken() -> 200 OK
4. CSP script-src self blocks the script load -> onerror fires -> promise rejects
5. Catch block sets status=error (but modal is hidden, user cannot see it)
7. User clicks join call -> setInCall(true) -> Modal visible -> JitsiEmbed RE-MOUNTS
8. Fresh useEffect: fetchJitsiToken() returns from cache (no network request)
9. loadJitsiScript() finds EXISTING <script data-cdn-jitsi=1> in DOM
10. Attaches new load/error listeners to the already-failed script element
11. Events already fired and will never fire again -> PROMISE HANGS FOREVER
12. status stays at loading -> UI shows requesting access token... indefinitely
root_cause_analysis.primary_bug: loadJitsiScript() attaches listeners to an existing script element that already failed, creating a permanently-pending promise
root_cause_analysis.secondary_bug: Cloudscape Modal renders children when visible=false, causing premature JitsiEmbed mount and token fetch
root_cause_analysis.csp_issue: script-src is self only - does not include https://meet.clouddelnorte.org - this blocks external_api.js (known, noted in task)
